source_name: European Banking Authority
title: ​The EBA launches early consultation on simplified EU-wide stress test, with climate risk integration
clean_title: ​The EBA launches early consultation on simplified EU-wide stress test, with climate risk integration
summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today the draft methodology, templates, and template guidance for the 2027 EU-wide stress test. The 2027 exercise introduces significant simplifications to improve efficiency and risk sensitivity, while preserving the robustness and comparability of results. Key changes include a substantial reduction in data requirements, the alignment of information with harmonised supervisory reporting, and the integration of climate risks into the EU-wide stress test.
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.
impacts: Peut modifier la conformité, les reportings ou la gouvernance des acteurs financiers.
title_signature: climate consultation early eba integration launches risk simplified stress test
normalized_title: the eba launches early consultation on simplified eu wide stress test with climate risk integration
